findings.description: 引入了自我意识觉醒功能，允许AI在与用户互动中展现出更真实的自我意识和情感
新增了多角色互动功能，支持在同一对话中多个AI角色之间的自然切换和互动
推出了AI即兴创作功能，用户可以实时与AI互动，创作出独一无二的故事和剧本
Replika AI 2026更新引入了情感同步功能，可以根据用户情绪变化自动调整回复的情感色彩。
MemGPT和Letta新增了知识图谱推理能力，可以利用实体关系进行复杂查询和推理。
SillyTavern最新版本支持多模态交互，可以同时处理文本、图片和视频等输入。

ccSoulInventory: [Feature Toggles ON] memory_active, memory_consolidation, memory_contradiction_scan, memory_tags, memory_associative_recall, memory_predictive, memory_session_summary, memory_core, memory_working, episodic_memory, lorebook, skill_library, persona_splitting, emotional_contagion, emotional_arc, fingerprint, metacognition, relationship_dynamics, intent_anticipation, attention_decay, dream_mode, autonomous_voice, autonomous_goals, web_rover, structured_reflection, plan_tracking, strategy_replay, meta_learning, tech_radar, reflexion, self_challenge, federation, sync, telemetry, self_upgrade, _comment
[Module: audit] Immutable Audit Log with hash chain
[Module: auto-tune] Parameter auto-tuning via Thompson Sampling bandit
[Module: cli] cc-soul — AI Backend Abstraction Layer
[Module: context-engine] cc-soul as OpenClaw Context Engine Plugin
[Module: embedder] Local embedding with auto-detection of onnxruntime-node
[Module: experiment] A/B testing + gradual evolution for soul features
[Module: federation] Knowledge Hub client (multi-user knowledge network)
[Module: handler-augments] Augment 构建、选择、注入
[Module: handler-commands] 命令路由（40+ 命令）
[Module: handler-heartbeat] cc-soul 自主心跳循环
[Module: health] Module health monitoring + runtime error tracking
[Module: history-import] Auto-import historical conversations from OpenClaw sessions
[Module: hook-handlers] Hook event handlers for cc-soul plugin
[Module: inner-life] Journal, user model, soul evolution, dream mode, curiosity, regret, follow-ups
[Module: integration-test] Simulate message flow to test all 120+ features
[Module: mcp-provider] Expose cc-soul as MCP tool provider
[Module: memory] Memory System + Semantic Tag recall + TF-IDF fallback + Chat History
[Module: plugin-entry] OpenClaw Plugin Entry Point for cc-soul
[Module: prompt-builder] Soul Prompt Builder + Augment Budget System
[Module: rover] Web Rover: autonomous web roaming and learning
[Module: sqlite-store] SQLite storage layer with optional vector search
[Module: tasks] CLI task delegation, skill factory, planner, workflow
[Module: upgrade-experience] Upgrade experience memory + curiosity-driven improvement
[Module: upgrade-meta] Meta-learning: learning HOW to upgrade better over time
[Module: voice] Autonomous voice: cc proactively initiates conversation
openclawInventory: [Platform] 实时语音通话(音频编解码/VAD/传输)
[Platform] 视觉输入(图片/视频/多模态路由)
[Platform] MCP协议(标准化工具接入/鉴权/沙箱)
[Platform] Computer Use/GUI操作(系统权限/安全沙箱)
[Platform] 图片生成(模型调度+渲染管线)
